revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates

revision.text:
'''{{{1}}}'''
{{{2}}}
 {{Show|Hello! This is a test header|Hello! This is the test content}}

'''{{{1}}}'''
{{{2}}}
 {{Show|Hello! This is a test header|Hello! This is the test content}}

'''{{{1}}}'''
{{{2}}}
 {{Show|Hello! This is a test header|Hello! This is the test content|green}}

'''{{{1}}}'''
{{{2}}}
 {{Show/docs}}

'''{{{1}}}'''
{{{2}}}
 {{template doc}}

'''{{{1}}}'''
{{{2}}}
 {{template doc|Show/doc}}

'''{{{1}}}'''
{{{2}}}
 {{template doc|Show/doc}}

'''{{{1}}}'''
{{{2}}}
 {{template doc|Show/doc}}

revision.comment: adjust how it works (and hope that it does
revision.text:
'''{{{1|}}}'''
{{{2|}}}
 {{template doc|Show/doc}}

'''{{{1|}}}'''
{{{2|}}}
 {{template doc|Show/doc}}

'''{{{1|}}}'''
{{{2|}}}
 {{Documentation, template|Template:Show/doc}}

revision.comment: removed backgroundcolor of header and the div for the content - this is used in places with formatted text or with a background
revision.text:
'''{{{1|}}}'''
{{{2|}}}
 {{Documentation, template|Template:Show/doc}}

'''{{{1|}}}'''
{{{2|}}}
 {{Documentation, template|Template:Show/doc}}

revision.comment: ok background in heade back, because it seems to be forced from the class

{{{2|Content}}}

revision.comment: Add parameters to allow additional styles for frame, head, and content sections. Remove interwiki links.

'''{{{1|Header}}}'''
{{{2|Content}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: keep this in sync with [[template:hidden begin]] and [[template:hidden end]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{hidden begin|style=padding: 0px;{{{frame-style|}}}|ta1={{{head-align|{{{headalign|left}}}}}}|titlestyle=padding: 0px;{{{head-style|}}}|title={{{1|<noinclude>Header</noinclude>}}}|ta2={{{content-align|{{{textalign|left}}}}}}|contentstyle=padding: 0px;{{{content-style|}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|<noinclude>Content</noinclude>}}}|{{{2|<noinclude>Content</noinclude>}}}{{hidden end}}|}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{hidden begin|style=padding: 0px;{{{frame-style|}}}|ta1={{{head-align|{{{headalign|left}}}}}}|titlestyle=padding: 0px;{{{head-style|}}}|title={{{1|<noinclude>Header</noinclude>}}}|ta2={{{content-align|{{{textalign|left}}}}}}|contentstyle=padding: 0px;{{{content-style|}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|<noinclude>Content</noinclude>}}}|{{{2|<noinclude>Content</noinclude>}}}{{hidden end}}|}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{hidden begin|style=padding: 0px;{{{frame-style|}}}|ta1={{{head-align|{{{headalign|left}}}}}}|titlestyle=padding: 0px;{{{head-style|}}}|title={{{1|<noinclude>Header</noinclude>}}}|ta2={{{content-align|{{{textalign|left}}}}}}|contentstyle=padding: 0px;{{{content-style|}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|<noinclude>Content</noinclude>}}}|{{{2|<noinclude>Content</noinclude>}}}{{hidden end}}|}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{hidden begin|style=padding: 0px;{{{frame-style|}}}|ta1={{{head-align|{{{headalign|left}}}}}}|titlestyle=padding: 0px;{{{head-style|}}}|title={{{1|<noinclude>Header</noinclude>}}}|ta2={{{content-align|{{{textalign|left}}}}}}|contentstyle=padding: 0px;{{{content-style|}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|<noinclude>Content</noinclude>}}}|{{{2|<noinclude>Content</noinclude>}}}{{hidden end}}|}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{hidden begin|style=padding: 0px;{{{frame-style|}}}|ta1={{{head-align|{{{headalign|left}}}}}}|titlestyle=padding: 0px;{{{head-style|}}}|title={{{1|<noinclude>Header</noinclude>}}}|ta2={{{content-align|{{{textalign|left}}}}}}|contentstyle=padding: 0px;{{{content-style|}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|<noinclude>Content</noinclude>}}}|{{{2|<noinclude>Content</noinclude>}}}{{hidden end}}|}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
